title: OpenTelemetry Context and Propagation Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → Context::getCurrent(): ContextInterface  [static, returns active context from storage]
Caller → Context::getRoot(): ContextInterface  [@internal, returns immutable root context]
Caller → context->with(ContextKeyInterface, $value): Context  [immutable copy with new value]
Caller → context->activate(): ScopeInterface  [makes context current, returns scope handle]
Caller → context->get(ContextKeyInterface): mixed  [read value from context]
Caller → scope->detach()  [ends active period, restores previous context]
Tracer → propagators[format]->inject(spanContext, &$carrier)  [looks up by format string]
TextMap → carrier['ot-baggage-{key}'] = baggageItem  [for each baggage item]
TextMap reads x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin
TextMap → new SpanContext(traceId, spanId, parentId, baggageItems, isDistributedTracingActivationContext=true)
TextMap → return SpanContext  [with isDistributedTracingActivationContext=true for distributed tracing]
--- SCENARIO E: Operation Name via Convention ---
Caller → Convention::defaultOperationName(SpanData): string  [resolves OTel-to-DD operation name mapping]
Caller → scopeManager->activate(Span, finishSpanOnClose=true): Scope  [push span onto active stack]
Caller → scopeManager->getActive(): ?Scope  [peek top of active stack]
Caller → scope->close()  [pop from stack; optionally finish span]
key_relationships: DDTrace\Tracer holds Propagator[] keyed by format string (TEXT_MAP, HTTP_HEADERS, BINARY)
Context::activate() returns OpenTelemetry\Context\ScopeInterface (OTel scope, distinct from DDTrace\Scope)
DDTrace\Data\SpanContext fields: traceId, spanId, parentId, isDistributedTracingActivationContext, propagatedPrioritySampling, origin, parentContext
important_notes: Two distinct propagation layers: DDTrace (OpenTracing-style) and OpenTelemetry. Both coexist in the stubs.
DDTrace\Propagator headers: x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin, ot-baggage-* prefix.
Formats class defines: TEXT_MAP (array/ArrayObject), HTTP_HEADERS (array/ArrayObject), BINARY (string). Tracer dispatches inject/extract by format key.
TextMap::extract sets isDistributedTracingActivationContext=true to signal distributed (remote) context.
OTel Context is immutable — with()/withContextValue() return new instances; activate() is the mutation point (via storage).
Context::resolve() coerces false/null → getCurrent(), allowing callers to pass optional parent contexts safely.
DDTrace\ScopeManager maintains an explicit active-span stack; deactivate()/close() pops it.
OTel ScopeInterface (from Context::activate()) is separate from DDTrace\Scope (from ScopeManager::activate()).
Convention::defaultOperationName() maps DDTrace SpanData to OTel operation name conventions.
SpanContext::createFromLocalSpan() bridges DDTrace\SpanData internal span to OTel SpanContextInterface.
startRootSpan() saves the root Scope for later retrieval via getRootScope(), unlike startActiveSpan().
